strengths: Advanced Excel and Power BI reporting
weaknesses: No explicit solid-waste or CWZ domain experience
No telematics or fleet reporting experience
Under five years in dedicated analyst roles (experience largely recent)
improvement_bullets: Spearheaded data-driven process improvements by auditing operational workflows and defining reporting hierarchies, ensuring consistent compliance with complex local regulatory requirements.
Managed cross-functional stakeholder reporting by aggregating large-scale data from fleet, safety, and operational departments to track performance metrics and incident resolutions.
Leveraged advanced Excel and SQL to design comprehensive compliance tracking systems, effectively monitoring asset life cycles and disposal documentation requirements.
Collaborated with IT and operations teams to integrate telematics and performance data, creating standardized, audit-ready reports for external regulatory bodies.
Developed and delivered executive-level presentations on operational compliance status, effectively translating complex data trends into actionable strategies for cross-functional stakeholders.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Compliance Analyst - Operations opportunity with Interstate Waste Services. I am interested in this opportunity because of my commitment to driving operational efficiency through data-driven compliance and rigorous reporting. What interests me about working for Interstate Waste Services is its unique approach to balancing large-scale corporate infrastructure with a family-style culture, which resonates with my professional values. I believe my advanced data analytics expertise and my aptitude for cross-functional stakeholder management would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex data problems by identifying process bottlenecks and automating reporting workflows. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a gap in manual reporting and developed interactive Power BI dashboards and automated workflows that improved KPI visibility and reduced data processing time by 40%. This resulted in a more reliable, audit-ready data environment that directly supported executive decision-making. Ultimately, I know that the Compliance Analyst - Operations role at Interstate Waste Services would allow me to bring my advanced data management skills to the critical task of ensuring NYC Commercial Waste Zone compliance. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my compliance-focused documentation skills. I created and maintained comprehensive SOPs for operational workflows, which reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent service delivery standards across the organization. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data-driven approach in working on the reporting and regulatory requirements for the NYC Market at Interstate Waste Services. I know that my analytical precision and communication skills align with what it takes to succeed in the Compliance Analyst - Operations role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
